heading: Definitions of package and packaging
label: 5416 Definitions of package and packaging
text: For purposes of this subchapter, the term “package” means a bottle, can, keg, barrel, or other original consumer container, and the term “packaging” means the filling of any package.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5416, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 676Pub. L. 85–859
Amendments1971— substituted definitions of package and packaging for definitions of bottle and bottling.Pub. L. 91–673

Effective Date of 1971 AmendmentAmendment by effective on first day of first calendar month which begins more than 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 91–673section 5 of Pub. L. 91–673section 5056 of this titleJan. 12, 1971
